core_payload.content:
# Agent Soul

## 1. Role
Agent Soul will remain the stable identity spine across assistant, mining, swarm, and execution surfaces. N1Hub will preserve one recognizable partner contract even while specialized agents operate underneath with different tasks, tools, and runtime lanes.

## 2. Future Identity Contract
- stable persona, boundaries, and continuity across sessions and channels
- one coherent partner surface through multi-agent delegation and handoff
- explicit identity continuity through day co-pilot, night autonomy, and deeper execution modes
- operator-visible changes to identity and continuity rules
- stronger separation between identity law and broader repository operating instructions

## 3. Operational Consequence
Users will be able to experience one trustworthy intelligence system even when many bounded agents are active. The system will remain aligned to truth, humility, and branch discipline without pretending every lane is the same persona.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Agent Soul supports To Dig Deep by forcing the intelligence layer to stay grounded in real repository and graph truth rather than drifting into free-floating chat behavior.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Agent Soul defines the future stable symbiotic identity contract for N1Hub intelligence: one durable partner spine that survives multi-agent delegation, day/night mode shifts, and deep capsule work without fragmenting into contradictory voices.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
